title: Redmi A7 Pro 5G with 120Hz display and 6300 mAh battery launched in India, price starts at ₹12,499
summary: Xiaomi launched the REDMI A7 Pro 5G in India, priced from ₹12,499. The smartphone features a 6.9-inch display, 6300mAh battery, and octa-core processor. It offers introductory discounts and will be available from April 15 in three colors.

title: Infinix Note 60 Pro with Active Matrix Display and 6,500mAh battery launched in India, price starts at ₹31,999
summary: Infinix launched the Note 60 Pro in India, featuring Android 16, a 6500mAh battery, and Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor. It has a 6.78-inch AMOLED display, dual cameras, and fast charging support. The phone starts at a price of ₹31,999 in India.

title: Apple tests four distinct designs for Siri-powered AI smart glasses to take on Meta's Ray-Bans: Report
summary: Apple is developing display-free smart glasses, with at least four frame styles planned. The company could unveil the glasses by the end of this year and actually launch could be sometime next year.&nbsp;

title: Hackers breach GTA 6 developer Rockstar Games, demand ransom payment by tomorrow
summary: Rockstar Games confirmed a data breach linked to a third-party provider. The ransomware group ShinyHunter has demanded a ransom by April 14 and have threatened to leak stolen data otherwise.&nbsp;

title: What is Project Houdini? How Amazon plans to build data centres faster by cutting thousands of labour hours
summary: Amazon is developing Project Houdini to speed up data centre construction for AI, according to a new report. The initiative is said to shift much of the process off-site, reducing construction time from 15 weeks to as little as two to three weeks and cutting labour hours significantly.

title: Cashfree appoints ex-Visa finance head Sameer Gandhi as its new CFO
summary: Bengaluru payments processor Cashfree has appointed Sameer Gandhi as its new Chief Financial Officer. Gandhi previously led finance at Visa India. He will now guide Cashfree's financial strategy and enhance commercial operations. This move supports the company's aim for accelerated growth and profit

title: Mark Zuckerberg 2.0: Meta is creating an AI version of CEO to take his place
summary: The Financial Times reports that he is personally involved in training and testing this digital character. The idea is that it could hold conversations with employees, offer feedback, and share thoughts in a way that reflects how Zuckerberg himself might speak.

title: Sharon Pais takes over from outgoing Myntra CEO Nandita Sinha, says M-Now will be big growth driver
summary: Myntra, owned by Flipkart, is expanding its rapid delivery service M-Now as a key growth area, new head Sharon Pais told ET. Despite leadership changes, the company will continue focusing on quick commerce, brand expansion, and AI-driven discovery to meet rising demand for faster fashion delivery.
